summary: Atmospheric audience recording captures a lively St. Stephen and jovial Uncle John’s Band, though Dark Star suffers from clipping.
review: The audience‑sourced tape lets the crowd become part of the music, with laughing, crying and coughing adding character to St. Stephen and a bright, communal vibe on Uncle John’s Band. Jerry Garcia’s backing vocals and his pedal‑steel work are highlighted as pleasant touches. The only technical drawback is a noticeable clipping that cuts off Dark Star early.

ai_rating.rationale: Single enthusiastic 5‑star review praises the performance and crowd ambience, but notes a recording glitch on Dark Star, tempering the rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crowd audible adds atmosphere; however, Dark Star clips out early, indicating some drop‑out/level issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set feels lively and communal, with the audience’s reactions enhancing St. Stephen and a joyful vibe on Uncle John’s Band; only Dark Star is marred by recording loss.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Backing vocals and pedal‑steel playing praised
